title: LearningActivity
description: A learning modality attached to a node or global. V0 defines the envelope only; no activities are authored yet. New modalities are added by extending the 'type' enum and adding a payload definition — node and global schemas never change.

target.description: The node or global this activity teaches: 'G{n}' or '{module-slug}.z{zone}.{n}'.

difficulty.description: Maps to the app's progressive-depth layers.

payload.description: Type-specific content. Validated against pipeline/validate/checks payload rules per type once modalities are implemented.

generated_by.description: Provenance, for QA sampling policy (machine-generated activities get audited at higher rates).
